---
mode: ask
description: Answer clarification questions generated by the last MCP Factory explore run and produce a ready-to-use /answer-gaps payload.
---

The file below contains clarification questions auto-generated by the MCP Factory pipeline after exploring a Windows DLL. The questions are the ones the LLM flagged as uncertain after all probe rounds completed.

**Questions (refreshed automatically after every `save-session.ps1` run):**

#file:../../sessions/current-gaps.md

---

Using your knowledge of the DLL described in those questions (and any context you can infer from the question text itself), answer each question as precisely as you can.

Return **only** a JSON object in this exact shape — ready to paste into a `curl` call against the `/api/jobs/{job_id}/answer-gaps` endpoint:

```json
{
  "answers": [
    {
      "function": "<exact function name from the question>",
      "question": "<the original question, verbatim>",
      "answer": "<your answer>"
    }
  ]
}
```

Rules:
- One entry per question.
- `function` must match the function name in the question header exactly (e.g., `CS_ProcessPayment`).
- Keep answers concise and factual — the answer is injected directly into a new probe mini-session as domain-expert context.
- If you are genuinely uncertain, say so briefly rather than guessing.
